sections.title: Methodology
sections.content: Each of ZOLLERN's 7 capability constraints is tested against the specific requirements of the elevator guide rail market. A constraint is **compatible** if the market requirement falls within the constraint boundary, **partially compatible** if workarounds exist, or **incompatible** if the constraint blocks market entry. [SRC: Christensen RPV framework]

sections.title: Constraint Compatibility Matrix
sections.content:
| # | Constraint | Market Requirement | Compatible? | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|-----------|-------------------|-------------|--------|-----------|
| C1 | 2D cross-section only | Guide rails ARE 2D cross-sections — constant T-profile along length | YES | No impact — perfect alignment | None needed |
| C2 | Min batch 100 kg (cold) / 500 kg (hot) | T89/B at 8.53 kg/m x 5m = 42.65 kg/bar. Min order ~60 bars = 2,560 kg | YES | Market orders typically 5-50 t per project | None needed |
| C3 | Tooling lead time 6-12 weeks | Market uses standardized ISO 7465 profiles. Once tooling exists, no new tooling per order | YES | One-time tooling investment, then repeat production | T89/B die: EUR 15-20K one-time |
| C4 | Cold drawing max 2,500 mm2 | T89/B cross-section = 1,087 mm2; T127/B = 2,054 mm2 | YES | Both standard sizes within cold drawing range (though hot rolling preferred for T-rails) | T140/B at 2,750 mm2 would require hot-roll only |
| C5 | Induction hardening requires C >= 0.35% | Standard rail material C45 (0.42-0.50% C) and 50CrMo4 (0.46-0.54% C) | YES | Both standard materials exceed 0.35% threshold | None needed |
| C6 | Steel only — no non-ferrous | Guide rails are exclusively carbon steel or alloy steel | YES | Perfect material alignment — no non-ferrous demand | None needed |
| C7 | Max single-piece weight | T89/B x 5m = 42.65 kg; T127/B x 5m = 81 kg. Max would be T140/B x 12m = 259 kg | YES | All standard configurations well within handling limits | None needed |

sections.title: Compatibility Summary
sections.content:
| Result | Count | Constraints |
|--------|-------|------------|
| Fully compatible | 7 | C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6, C7 |
| Partially compatible | 0 | - |
| Incompatible | 0 | - |
| **Overall compatibility** | **100%** | **All constraints pass** |

sections.title: Volume Compatibility Deep Dive
sections.content:
The elevator guide rail market is also tested against economic viability constraints:

| Volume Metric | Market Reality | ZOLLERN Threshold | Compatible? |
|--------------|---------------|------------------|-------------|
| Minimum order quantity | Typical project: 200-500 bars (8.5-21.3 t) | Min 500 kg (hot rolling) | YES — orders 17x-43x above minimum |
| Annual volume per customer | Major OEM: 500-2,000 t/year | Meaningful: >100 t/year | YES |
| DACH SAM | ~12,000 t/year (T-rail profiles only) | Meaningful: >500 t/year | YES — 24x above threshold |
| Seasonality | Moderate — construction-driven, Q2-Q3 peak | Even utilization preferred | ACCEPTABLE — buffer stock compensates |
| Order frequency | Monthly call-offs from framework contracts | Weekly production cycle | YES — aligns with production rhythm |

sections.title: Certification Compatibility
sections.content:
While not a hard capability constraint, certification is a market-entry gate:

| Certification | Status | Required? | Investment | Timeline |
|--------------|--------|-----------|-----------|----------|
| ISO 9001:2015 | HELD | Yes (baseline) | EUR 0 | Immediate |
| EN 10204 Type 3.1 | CAPABLE | Yes (material cert) | EUR 0 | Immediate |
| EN 81-1/EN 81-50 type test | NOT HELD | Yes (market entry) | EUR 30-50K | 6-9 months |
| EU Declaration of Performance (DoP) | NOT HELD | Yes (CE marking for construction products) | EUR 10-15K | 3-4 months |
| Notified body audit | NOT DONE | Yes (for type test) | Included in type test cost | Part of 6-9 month timeline |

sections.title: Risk Assessment
sections.content:
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|-----------|
| Type test failure (straightness) | MEDIUM | HIGH — delays entry 6+ months | Invest in straightening upgrade BEFORE type test |
| Material grade rejection by OEM | LOW | MEDIUM — reformulate | C45+QT is industry standard; low risk |
| Tooling failure during production | LOW | LOW — replacement die 4-6 weeks | Keep spare die set (EUR 15-20K) |
| Order volume below break-even | LOW | MEDIUM | SAM is 24x minimum threshold |
